title: Esoterica Origins
description: Adds Touhou origins: Youkai, Deities and even Humans
body:
# About

What this mod hopes to achieve:

- Add origins based on as many touhou characters/species as possible, also offering alternative origins within the same species/character, like ReimuA and ReimuB.
- Depict the basic character abilities/personality without necessarily being 100% faithful to the lore, e.g. Flandre = Destruction and Fairies = Nature.
- Keep the origins *somewhat* balanced (e.g. no direct upgrades over other origins) and hopefully fun.
- Allow different playstyles depending on the origin, e.g. Sakuya = Precise, Keiki = Builder, Satori = Support, Maribel = Speedrun etc.

## Origins

As of version 0.16.0, the mod adds 64 different origins. Refer to [the docs](https://github.com/wdfeer/esoterica-origins/blob/master/docgen/origins.md) for names and descriptions of their powers as seen in-game.

## Not Origins

- *Flawless* status effect: used to depict immortality on some origins (mostly Lunarians) without making them literally unkillable, inspired by [Touhou: Lost Branch of Legend](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1140150/Touhou_Lost_Branch_of_Legend/).
- *Graze* status effect: used to depict dodging/agile origins, primarily tengu.

# Obvious stuff

_東方Project and all related characters are property of **Team Shanghai Alice** aka **ZUN**_

<hr>

Requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
